title: Work From Home vs Office
text: Discuss the pros and cons of work-from-home culture versus traditional office work. Consider productivity, work-life balance, career growth, and team collaboration.

title: AI and Future of Jobs
text: Will AI create more jobs than it destroys? Discuss the impact of AI on employment, required skills for the future, and how India can prepare its workforce.

title: Social Media Impact on Society
text: How is social media shaping our society? Discuss its influence on mental health, politics, relationships, and information spread.

title: Indian Education System
text: Should the Indian education system focus more on practical skills over theoretical knowledge? Discuss curriculum reforms, exam pressure, and vocational training.

title: Climate Change: Individual vs Government Action
text: Who bears more responsibility for climate action - individuals through lifestyle changes or governments through policies? Discuss with examples.

title: Startup vs Corporate Career
text: For a fresh graduate, is joining a startup better than a corporate job? Discuss growth opportunities, learning, stability, and long-term career impact.

title: Digital Privacy vs Convenience
text: Are we sacrificing too much privacy for digital convenience? Discuss data collection, surveillance, and the balance between privacy and personalized services.

title: Reservation in Higher Education
text: Should reservation policies in Indian higher education be based on economic status rather than caste? Discuss merit, social justice, and equal opportunity.

title: Cryptocurrency in India
text: Should India embrace or restrict cryptocurrency? Discuss economic impact, financial inclusion, regulatory challenges, and youth investment trends.

title: Mental Health in Colleges
text: How can Indian colleges better support student mental health? Discuss counseling, academic pressure, awareness, and cultural stigma.

title: Coding for Everyone?
text: Should coding be a mandatory skill for all students, regardless of career path? Discuss digital literacy, career flexibility, and modern requirements.

title: Global Brands vs Local Businesses
text: Are global brands harming local businesses in India? Discuss consumer choice, economic impact, cultural identity, and quality standards.

title: Women in STEM Fields
text: Why are fewer women choosing STEM careers in India? Discuss societal factors, education system, workplace culture, and role models.

title: Urban Migration and Tier-2 Cities
text: Should young professionals continue migrating to metros or consider tier-2/3 cities? Discuss opportunities, cost of living, and quality of life.

title: Online Learning Effectiveness
text: Is online learning as effective as classroom learning for professional courses? Discuss engagement, quality, accessibility, and skill development.
